message:
feat(wezterm): respect WA_WEZTERM_CLI env var for binary path

WeztermClient and main.rs hardcoded Command::new("wezterm") but test
helpers set WA_WEZTERM_CLI=/nonexistent/wezterm. Now both wezterm.rs
run_cli() and all three Command::new calls in main.rs resolve the
binary via wezterm_binary() which checks WA_WEZTERM_CLI first.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
